keyFeatures.en: Image compression for various file formats
keyFeatures.zh: 支持多种文件格式的图像压缩

keyFeatures.en: High compression ratio without significant loss of quality
keyFeatures.zh: 无明显质量损失的高压缩比

description.en: No ads, limited to 100MB per month

weaknesses.en: Limited file size and monthly credit limit
weaknesses.zh: 文件大小和每月积分限制较小

positioning.en: A simple and effective tool for compressing images
positioning.zh: 一个简单有效的图像压缩工具
